set-variable.name: ipAllowed

validate-jwt.failed-validation-error-message: Unauthorized: Invalid or missing Bearer token

set-variable.name: oidAuthorized
deployment
set-variable.value: @{ var parts = context.Request.Url.Path.Split('/'); var idx = System.Array.IndexOf(parts, "deployments"); return (idx >= 0 && idx + 1 < parts.Length) ? parts[idx + 1] : ""; }

send-one-way-request.set-body: @{ var log = new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JObject( new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("timestamp", context.Variables["requestTimestamp"]), new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("oid", context.Variables["oid"]), new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("tid", context.Variables["tid"]), new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("sub", context.Variables["sub"]), new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("appid", context.Variables["appid"]), new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("azp", context.Variables["azp"]), new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("model", context.Variables["model"]), new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("deployment", context.Variables["deployment"]), new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("operation", context.Operation != null ? context.Operation.Name : context.Request.Method), new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("promptTokens", int.Parse((string)context.Variables["promptTokens"])), new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("completionTokens", int.Parse((string)context.Variables["completionTokens"])), new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("totalTokens", int.Parse((string)context.Variables["totalTokens"])), new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("httpStatus", context.Response.StatusCode), new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("backendStatus", context.Response.StatusCode), new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("latencyMs", (int)context.Elapsed.TotalMilliseconds), new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("backendLatencyMs", (int)context.Elapsed.TotalMilliseconds), new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("requestId", context.Variables["requestId"]), new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("correlationId", context.Variables["correlationId"]), new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("traceparent", context.Request.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("traceparent", "")), new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("clientIp", context.Request.IpAddress), new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("userAgent", context.Request.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("User-Agent", "")), new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("xMsClientRequestId", context.Request.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("x-ms-client-request-id", "")), new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("xMsRequestId", context.Response.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("x-ms-request-id", "")) ).ToString(Newtonsoft.Json.Formatting.None); return "<QueueMessage><MessageText>" + System.Convert.ToBase64String(System.Text.Encoding.UTF8.GetBytes(log)) + "</MessageText></QueueMessage>"; }
